texto: I think that's a great opportunity, to pick a script where you can build up a good skill. I think the main thing I look for when I look at scripts is if it's inspirational. If it's something that teenagers can relate to. And is it something that the audience is going to get something out of. If not, then it's really not worth doing.
explicacao: Citação de Carly Schroeder sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I think that's a great opportunity, to pick a script where you can build up a good skill. I think…” articula motivacao, good, great em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e great.
